questions.question: Develop a 16-bit CRC-CCITT algorithm to detect single-bit errors in a given data sequence. Explain the steps involved in the process and describe how the algorithm generates the CRC value.
questions.hint: Describe the mathematical equations used in the CRC-CCITT algorithm

questions.question: Write a C++ program to compute the 16-bit CRC-CCITT for a given data sequence. The program should take the data sequence as input, compute the CRC value, and display the result. Provide a detailed explanation of the program's logic and functionality.
questions.hint: Use bitwise operations and XOR to compute the CRC value

questions.question: Suppose a data sequence with 8 bits is transmitted over a noisy channel, resulting in 3 bits of error. Using the 16-bit CRC-CCITT algorithm, determine if the data sequence has errors. Provide a step-by-step explanation of how the algorithm will handle the error and provide the CRC value.
questions.hint: Focus on the error detection capability of the CRC-CCITT algorithm
